# Muditek

> AI systems that eliminate operational waste.

Muditek diagnoses where companies lose money to manual operations and builds AI systems that fix it. Founded by Ghiles Moussaoui. Based in Europe.

## Services

- [mudiAgent](https://muditek.com/mudiagent): On-premises AI digital employees for telecom and enterprise. Automates SLA reporting, knowledge search, follow-ups, and software operation. No cloud, no per-user fees. 40-hour guarantee.
- [Revenue Leak Audit](https://muditek.com/revenue-leak-audit): Diagnoses where B2B SaaS pipelines lose €80-180K/year with exact formulas. Builds AI systems to fix speed-to-lead, pipeline conversion, churn, and outbound performance. €50K guarantee.
- [Operational Infrastructure for Private Equity & Investment Banking](https://muditek.com/pe-ops): Custom operational infrastructure for private equity and investment banking firms. Investor onboarding, KYC automation, document generation, e-signatures, fee computation. Alternative to Juniper Square at a fraction of the cost.

## Product

- [MudiKit](https://muditek.com/buy): $47/month subscription operator library — 15+ Claude Code skills (outreach, lead gen, content writing, scraping, inbox SDR), 6 implementation playbooks, vault template, 20+ outreach templates, open-source lead capture system. New skills and playbooks drop every month. Cancel anytime via Stripe.

## Tools

- [Revenue Leak Calculator](https://muditek.com/tools/revenue-leak-calculator): Free calculator that estimates annual revenue leakage from speed-to-lead decay, pipeline conversion gaps, and excess churn.

## Industries

- [Who We Help (index)](https://muditek.com/who-we-help): Five industries served by Muditek with industry-specific AI systems and case studies.
- [Private Equity & VC](https://muditek.com/who-we-help/private-equity): Custom operational infrastructure for PE and VC firms — investor onboarding in 3-5 days, KYC, fee computation, document generation. You own the platform.
- [B2B SaaS](https://muditek.com/who-we-help/b2b-saas): B2B SaaS at €800K-€1.8M ARR — diagnose where pipeline, conversion, and churn leak money in euros, then ship the AI systems that fix each leak.
- [Marketing & Dev Agencies](https://muditek.com/who-we-help/agencies): Recover 20+ hours/week from manual content, reporting, and client ops. MudiKit operator library plus targeted custom builds.
- [Telecom Operators](https://muditek.com/who-we-help/telecom): On-premises AI for SLA reporting, NOC automation, knowledge search, and software operation. No cloud, no per-user fees.
- [Fintech & Payments](https://muditek.com/who-we-help/fintech): Custom operational infrastructure for KYC review queues, automated expiry alerts, reconciliation, and compliance workflows you own.

## Case Studies

- [Case Studies (index)](https://muditek.com/case-studies): Real-pattern case studies of AI systems Muditek has built across PE, B2B SaaS, agencies, telecom, and fintech.
- [PE Onboarding (Merchant Bank)](https://muditek.com/case-studies/private-equity-onboarding): Regulated merchant banking firm cut LP onboarding from weeks to 3-5 days. 26 modules, 7 stakeholder roles, 9 automated workflows.
- [SaaS Revenue Leak](https://muditek.com/case-studies/saas-revenue-leak): €800K ARR B2B SaaS found €120K/year in pipeline leakage in two weeks. Speed-to-lead, conversion, and churn fixed with three targeted AI systems.
- [Agency Content Engine](https://muditek.com/case-studies/agency-content-engine): 5-person marketing agency cut social production from 20 hrs/week to 20 minutes. Same quality, 60x throughput.
- [Telecom NOC Automation](https://muditek.com/case-studies/telecom-noc-automation): 50-person regional telco cut weekly SLA report production from 2-3 days to under one hour. On-premises mudiAgent.
- [Fintech Compliance Ops](https://muditek.com/case-studies/fintech-compliance-ops): 30-person fintech cut KYC review backlog from 14 days to under 48 hours. Owned compliance infrastructure.

## Comparison Pages

- [mudiAgent vs ChatGPT Enterprise](https://muditek.com/mudiagent-vs-chatgpt): On-premises digital employee with workflow automation vs cloud chatbox. Data sovereignty, no per-user fees, scheduled autonomous operation.
- [Muditek vs Juniper Square](https://muditek.com/pe-ops-vs-juniper-square): Own a custom PE ops platform for €40-80K vs rent Juniper Square at $700K+/year. KYC, e-signatures, fee computation, full source.
- [MudiKit vs Skool](https://muditek.com/mudikit-vs-skool): $47/mo Claude Code skills library you install and run vs hosted community platform with courses, threads, and gamification.
- [MudiKit vs Circle](https://muditek.com/mudikit-vs-circle): $47/mo Claude Code skills library vs tiered community platform with spaces, events, and white-label apps.

## Newsletter & Resources

- [Muditek Newsletter](https://muditek.com/newsletter): Weekly playbooks for AI operators, B2B operators, and investment professionals. 5,000+ subscribers across telecom, SaaS, and finance. Archive of 29+ issues.
- [Portal Resources](https://muditek.com/portal): Signed-in library for playbooks, guides, skills, tools, newsletter articles, and MudiKit drops. Public resource links now use tracked unlock routes like `https://muditek.com/r/ai-data-agent-guide` and require account creation before opening inside the portal.
- [About / Founder](https://muditek.com/about): Background on Ghiles Moussaoui, the methodology, and how to book a call.

## Target Audiences

- Telecom operators and traders with 50+ employees needing on-premises AI automation
- B2B SaaS founders at €800K-1.8M ARR with 2-5 sales reps losing pipeline revenue
- Private equity, venture capital, and investment banking firms managing investor operations across multiple jurisdictions
- Marketing and development agencies (3+ people, 3+ retainer clients) recovering hours from manual content and reporting
- Fintech and payments firms automating KYC, expiry tracking, and compliance ops
- Solo operators, AI builders, and consultants using Claude Code who want production-grade skills they can deploy this week (MudiKit)

## Key Differentiators

- Diagnose first: every engagement starts with a diagnostic that quantifies the problem in euros with formulas
- Client owns everything: source code, infrastructure, data. No SaaS subscriptions, no vendor lock-in
- Weeks not months: delivered in 4-8 weeks, not 12-18 month enterprise projects
- On-premises AI: data stays in the client's building, never touches third-party servers

## Guarantees

- mudiAgent: 40 hours saved in 90 days or reconfigured at no cost
- Revenue Leak Audit: €50K in annual leakage found or you pay nothing
- Operational Infrastructure: €150K+ in annual operational waste identified or you pay nothing
- MudiKit: cancel anytime via Stripe customer portal, no annual lock-in

## Markdown Routes

These pages are also available in clean Markdown for AI agents that prefer text/markdown over HTML:

- https://muditek.com/index.md (homepage)
- https://muditek.com/mudiagent.md
- https://muditek.com/revenue-leak-audit.md
- https://muditek.com/pe-ops.md
- https://muditek.com/buy.md (MudiKit)
- https://muditek.com/about.md

Each page also declares its Markdown alternate via `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">` in the HTML head.
